headline: Northern Trust Deepens Global Impact Through Philanthropic Support and Record Volunteerism
summary: CHICAGO, April 07, 2026--Northern Trust’s 2025 Philanthropic Impact Report details the firm's philanthropic investment and global volunteerism across 4 critical focus areas.
